pi_items.verified_value: Metformin HCl 500mg Tablets (real pharmaceutical product, but scenario is synthetic)
pi_items.source: Web search: Mayo Clinic, FDA, Drugs.com confirm Metformin HCl 500mg tablets are FDA-approved pharmaceutical products

pi_items.verified_value: Q = 75% at 30 minutes (realistic USP specification for immediate-release tablets)
pi_items.source: Web search: USP dissolution testing guidelines confirm Q = 75% at 30 minutes is within standard acceptable range for tablets. Each unit must dissolve at least Q + 5% = 80%.

pi_items.verified_value: All six categories are correct for Ishikawa/6M fishbone diagrams
pi_items.source: Web search: ASQ, Wikipedia, Kaizen confirm 6M categories are: Manpower (People), Machine (Equipment), Method (Process), Material (Raw Materials), Measurement (Analysis/Inspection), and Milieu (Mother Nature/Environment). 'Milieu' is the French equivalent of 'Environment'.

pi_items.verified_value: All 13 keywords are present in the generated deviation report
pi_items.source: Code analysis: Verified by searching the deviation report text generated by setup_task.sh. All 13 keywords found: 'granulation endpoint' (multiple), 'night shift', 'punch' (in 'punch tooling'), 'dryer', 'sensor', 'humidity' (72% RH excursion), 'blending time' (15min to 10min reduction), 'particle size' (D90=285μm), 'moisture' (6.8%), 'paddle' (dissolution apparatus paddle), 'hplc' (387 injections), 'excursion' (humidity excursion), 'temperature' (sensor drift, room temperature).

pi_items.verified_value: 14 distinct root cause items can be counted from the report
pi_items.source: Code analysis: Manual count of root causes listed in deviation report: MANPOWER (3 items: endpoint check bypass, night shift shortage, SOP ambiguity), MACHINE (2: punch wear, sensor drift), METHOD (2: high RH validation gap, blending time reduction), MATERIAL (3: particle size spec violation, supplier cert verification gap, moisture spec violation), MEASUREMENT (2: paddle height deviation, HPLC column past requalification), MILIEU (2: humidity excursion, temperature rise). Total = 14.

pi_items.verified_value: Exactly 5 Corrective and Preventive Actions listed in report
pi_items.source: Code analysis: Setup script creates report with exactly 5 CAPAs: (1) Replace punch tooling, (2) Revise SOP-PRO-055 for mandatory endpoint checks, (3) Initiate Change Control CC-2024-102 for high-humidity validation, (4) Re-train warehouse staff on API PSD verification, (5) Calibrate temperature sensors monthly.

pi_items.metadata_value: Dissolution failure investigation for a pharmaceutical batch
pi_items.verified_value: Realistic pharmaceutical quality investigation scenario with proper GMP/USP terminology and structure
pi_items.source: Web search + code analysis: USP dissolution testing is standard for pharmaceutical quality. The scenario includes realistic manufacturing issues (sensor drift, material spec violations, environmental excursions) consistent with FDA cGMP requirements. Deviation ID format (DEV-2024-0847), batch numbering (BT-20240312), and investigation structure follow pharmaceutical industry standards.

pi_items.verified_value: Report is created at /home/ga/Desktop/deviation_report_DEV-2024-0847.txt by setup_task.sh
pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 7-61 create the report file at this exact path and set permissions

pi_items.verified_value: All data is synthetic/generated by setup_task.sh at task runtime. No external data sources are used.
pi_items.source: Code analysis: The entire deviation report is created by the setup_task.sh script as a heredoc (lines 7-61). No URLs, downloads, or external file imports are referenced. Company name (PharmaCo Manufacturing), batch number (BT-20240312), deviation ID (DEV-2024-0847), approver names (Sarah Jenkins, Robert Chen), and all investigation details are fabricated for the task scenario.
Code analysis: install_drawio.sh line 67 specifies DRAWIO_VERSION="26.0.9". This is the draw.io Desktop version that will be used for the task.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic desktop automation scenario involving pharmaceutical quality documentation. The product (Metformin HCl 500mg tablets) is a real pharmaceutical product with established USP dissolution specifications, but the deviation investigation scenario is entirely fictional and generated at task runtime. The deviation report for 'Batch BT-20240312' (Deviation ID: DEV-2024-0847) contains exactly 14 root causes distributed across 6 valid Ishikawa diagram categories (Manpower, Machine, Method, Material, Measurement, Milieu/Environment). All 13 required cause-related keywords are present in the generated report. The report lists exactly 5 Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPAs). The task requires agents to create a draw.io-based Ishikawa fishbone diagram documenting these findings and export it as both a .drawio file and PNG image. The scenario follows realistic pharmaceutical manufacturing and quality investigation practices with proper GMP terminology and structure.
